positive: A whimsical, stylized geometric arrangement featuring a stylized mountain range silhouette at sunset. The foreground includes simple, repeating patterns of crescent moons and stylized stars, integrated with abstract fauna like minimalist deer and soaring swallows. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, mustard yellow, and cream. The style must be modern flat graphic design, combining elements of mid-century modern illustration and Art Deco symmetry. The composition should be highly centralized and balanced, suitable for repeating textile prints, utilizing strong, clean silhouettes and crisp vector lines. Perfect for high-contrast screen printing on apparel.
negative: blurry, grainy, watermark, signature, text, logo, jpeg artifacts, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, poorly rendered hands, gradient (unless intentional), realistic photography, 3D rendering, cartoonish, messy, clutter
